ākulita a.
1 Distressed, confounded, agitated; mārgācalavyatikarākuliteva siṃdhuḥ  Ku. 5. 85. 
2 Entangled;  K. 83. 
3 Obscured, blinded; dhūma˚ dṛṣṭeḥ  Ś. 4. 
4 Overcome or affected; śoka˚, pipāsā˚ &c.
5 Disordered, deranged;  R. 16. 67 ;  Rs. 6. 17. 
6 Tilled.
